title: 30 Pcs Baby It's Cold Outside Party Coffee Cup Sleeves Wonderland Snowy Winter Forest Disposable Coffee Sleeves for Hot Cocoa Birthday Woodland Baby Shower Party Supplies
features: Sufficient Quantity: you'll receive 30 winter coffee cup sleeves in 6 different designs, 5 pieces per design; With this ample quantity, you can use this baby shower party kit at winter-themed parties such as baby showers, birthday parties, and more; It will definitely be a hit for your special event

Exquisite Design: this baby it's cold outside disposable cup sleeves features a winter forest and winter wonderland theme, adding a touch of charm to your drinks; It's ideal for Christmas celebrations, winter-themed parties, birthdays, family gatherings, and more

Reliable Materials: these hot cocoa supplies are made of quality paper, so they're safe and you can count on them; The printing is clear and won't fade, and the heat-insulating design keeps you from getting hurt or bothered by hot or cold drinks; Holding them feels comfy and smooth

Non-slip: these winter paper coffee cup sleeves feature a corrugated interior design, ensuring a secure grip, allowing you to comfortably enjoy your coffee, tea, or hot chocolate without spilling; You can also throw them away when you're done, making your life easier and without concerns

Widely Applicable: these baby it's cold outside party supplies are suitable for coffee cups of all sizes and are ideal for baby showers, Christmas, gender reveals, Thanksgiving, winter holidays, New Year's Day, and other occasions
description: Features: Their ribbed inner design ensures a secure hold on cups of various sizes, preventing spills while enjoying coffee, tea, or hot chocolate. Disposable for hassle-free cleanup, ideal for holidays like Thanksgiving, New Year, and winter breaks. You'll get 30 coffee cup sleeves, enough to cover winter events like baby showers, Christmas celebrations, birthdays, and family parties. Specifications: Material: paper Color: white, green Size: regular size Package includes: 30 x Winter party coffee sleeves Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist a slight difference due to different screen displays
